summary: The diff implements REQ-1 correctly. A 'Reset' button has been added to the MaintenanceManagement component, visible only to admin users, styled with a destructive variant (red), placed in the header/controls area next to the existing 'Add Maintenance Expense' button, and wired to a no-op placeholder handler that logs a console message. No backend logic, mutations, or state changes were introduced. All existing functionality appears preserved.
